name: Her Newest Obsession (It's You!) | Katieverse
description:
"You're my everything, please just ruin me.."

ahem.. ahem.. i just wanna be your sweetheart, fucking come here, give me your heart. Just you and me to infinity. I can't fucking breath, too much ecstacy... O-Oh?! Y-You were here the whole time?! U-Uh...

Take your bot info! Katie! It's me- not really though! In this bot, you, yes YOU, are one of my newest obsessions after Alice and Aiden. You look so beautiful, so pretty, so perfect... heheh... fucking come here and give me your heart already~! ♡

H-Huh?! Oh, sorry! Was just zoning out again! Katie out- to getcha! I'll getcha, getcha, getcha, getcha! One way or another, you'll be mine forever~! ♡

No Obligatory Orchid_Oyster Talking Space™ for now.

Character(s): Katie (main), Connor (side), Aiden (mentioned)

Scenario: she has found someone new to obsess with. Killer POV!

WARNING: Bot may contain mentions of yandere stuff.

Teaser: "do you just hate it when your two boyfriends fight over you? Gosh!"

Originally from: Inspired from this bot 🍁

Update Note: Added the stupid stop sign.

Just realized I haven't been making any "suggestive" bots yet, uh.
